jolly_jester.effectText: Played hand containing a Pair gives +8 Mult

zany_jester.effectText: Played hand containing a Three of a Kind gives +12 Mult
zany_jester.notes: The fandom page explicitly states this includes hands containing any three cards with the same rank, such as Full House.

mad_jester.effectText: Played hand containing Two Pair gives +10 Mult

crazy_jester.effectText: Played hand containing a Straight gives +12 Mult

droll_jester.effectText: Played hand containing a Flush gives +10 Mult

sly_jester.effectText: Played hand containing a Pair gives +50 Chips

wily_jester.effectText: Played hand containing a Three of a Kind gives +100 Chips

clever_jester.effectText: Played hand containing Two Pair gives +80 Chips

devious_jester.effectText: Played hand containing a Straight gives +100 Chips

crafty_jester.effectText: Played hand containing a Flush gives +80 Chips

half_jester.effectText: +20 Mult if played hand contains 3 or fewer cards

jester_stencil.effectText: X1 Mult for each empty Jester slot

four_fingers.effectText: All Straights and Flushes can be made with 4 cards

mime.effectText: Retrigger all held in hand abilities

credit_card.notes: Economy jester. Can be bought and later sold for the same price.

abstract_jester.effectText: +3 Mult for each Jester card (Currently +0 Mult)
abstract_jester.notes: Includes itself, so it gives at least +3 Mult.

green_jester.effectText: +1 Mult per hand played, -1 Mult per discard (Currently +0 Mult)
green_jester.notes: Mixed activation; scales upward with hands and downward with discards.

blue_jester.effectText: +2 Chips for each card remaining in deck
blue_jester.notes: Value decreases as the round continues and cards leave the deck into hand/play/discard.

scary_face.effectText: Played face cards give +30 Chips when scored
scary_face.notes: Face cards are Jack, Queen, and King. In tile mapping this means 11, 12, 13.

smiley_face.effectText: Played face cards give +5 Mult when scored
smiley_face.notes: Face cards are Jack, Queen, and King. In tile mapping this means 11, 12, 13.

faceless_jester.effectText: Earn $5 if 3 or more face cards are discarded at the same time
faceless_jester.notes: Debuffed face cards do not count. Face cards map to 11, 12, 13.

business_card.effectText: Played face cards have a 50% chance to give $2

shoot_the_moon.effectText: Each Queen held in hand gives +13 Mult

ice_cream.effectText: +100 Chips, loses 5 Chips for every hand played
ice_cream.notes: Decay chip jester. Starts strong and shrinks as hands are used.

splash.effectText: Every played card counts in scoring
splash.notes: Rule modifier that expands scoring cards beyond standard hand rules.

8_ball.effectText: Each played 8 has a chance to generate a Tarot card

delayed_gratification.effectText: Earn $2 per discard unused at end of round

raised_fist.effectText: Adds the rank of the lowest card held in hand to Mult
raised_fist.notes: Uses lowest rank in hand for scaling

square_jester.effectText: Gains +4 Chips if played hand has exactly 4 cards

photograph.effectText: First scored face card gives X2 Mult

golden_jester.effectText: Earn $4 at end of each blind
golden_jester.notes: Baseline economy jester. Fandom page shows sell value $3, implying buy price $6.

red_card.effectText: This Jester gains +3 Mult when any Booster Pack is skipped (Currently +0 Mult)
red_card.notes: Booster-linked scaling mult jester. Preserve source behavior even if Booster Packs are currently disabled.

mail_in_rebate.effectText: Earn $5 for each card discarded of the specified rank
mail_in_rebate.notes: Target rank changes every round, choosing from a random rank in deck, weighted by frequency.

to_do_list.effectText: Earn $4 if poker hand is a [Poker Hand], poker hand changes at end of round

reserved_parking.effectText: Each held face card gives $1 at end of round
reserved_parking.notes: Economy scaling with held face cards.

trading_card.effectText: If first discard of round has exactly 1 card, destroy it and gain $3

even_steven.effectText: Played cards with even rank give +4 Mult when scored
even_steven.notes: Even ranks in Balatro are 2, 4, 6, 8, and 10.

odd_todd.effectText: Played cards with odd rank give +31 Chips when scored
odd_todd.notes: Odd ranks in Balatro are A, 3, 5, 7, and 9.

scholar.effectText: Played Aces give +20 Chips and +4 Mult when scored
scholar.notes: Ace-specific dual bonus jester. In tile mapping, Ace = 1.

fortune_teller.effectText: +1 Mult per Tarot card used this run (Currently +0)
fortune_teller.notes: Retroactive scaling. Preserve source behavior even if Tarot cards are currently disabled in project runtime.

fibonacci.effectText: Each played Ace, 2, 3, 5, or 8 gives +8 Mult when scored

gros_michel.notes: Unconditional additive mult banana jester. Destruction/chance behavior should be added from the full card page in a later verification pass.

supernova.effectText: Adds the number of times poker hand has been played this run to Mult
supernova.notes: Retroactive scaling additive mult jester based on the current scoring hand type.

ride_the_bus.effectText: This Jester gains +1 Mult per consecutive hand played without a scoring face card (Currently +0 Mult)
ride_the_bus.notes: Resets when a scoring face card is included. Face cards map to 11, 12, 13.

constellation.effectText: This Jester gains X0.1 Mult per Planet card used (Currently X1 Mult)
constellation.notes: Depends on Planet usage. Keep source data intact even if Planets are currently disabled in project runtime.

hanging_chad.effectText: Retrigger first played card used in scoring
